stdout:
I found local changes in `proofs/` plus JIT metadata. Next I’ll inspect the exact Lean diffs and then run relevant proof/build checks before scoring each review criterion.

## Issue Success Criteria

Implemented and evidenced in `proofs/Gf2Core/Proofs/MontgomeryRoundtrip.lean`:

- `inv(a)` path is tied to exponentiation via `mod_pow_mont` (`fp_inv_correct`, around `L1457-L1479`).
- Fermat-based inverse property is proven with `ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one` transfer (`fermat_inv_nat`, `L1392-L1413`) and used to conclude `vi.val * vs.val % P.val = 1` (`L1492-L1493`).
- Division structure is proven by unfolding `div` and showing it is `mul` with `inv` (`fp_div_correct`, especially `L1529-L1539`).

## Separation of Concerns

Changes are confined to `proofs/` Lean files and JIT metadata; no `gf2-core`↔`gf2-coding` dependency boundary changes.

## Functional Paradigm and Performance

No runtime Rust kernel changes; only theorem/progress definitions. No performance regressions introduced.

## Correctness

No `BitVec` mutators were changed, so tail-masking/bit-index invariants are unaffected.

## Testing

I could not run `lake/cargo` locally due environment permission denial. Used issue gate evidence: `lake-build` is `passed` (`.jit/issues/104a46c2-...json`, `L22-L25`). No run-history feedback items were provided.

## Unsafe Isolation

No Rust `unsafe` changes; scope is Lean proofs only.

## Documentation

Added focused theorem docs for `fp_inv_correct` and `fp_div_correct`; also replaced `Option.expect` axiom with executable semantics in `FunsExternal.lean` (`L62-L69`), reducing proof debt.

## Prior Review Feedback

`run_history` is empty; no unresolved prior findings.

## Dependency Check

Prerequisite issue `0e7cb099` is `done` with required gates passed; current proofs build directly on `mod_pow_mont` correctness.

VERDICT: PASS
